title: Waterwork (Declaration of Water Supply Areas) (Boards) Order, 2002
title_en: Waterwork (Declaration of Water Supply Areas) (Boards) Order, 2002

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Waterwork (Declaration of Water Supply Areas) (Boards) Order, 2002.

The Boards specified in the Schedule to this Order are hereby declared to be water supply Boards specified in paragraph C of sub regulation (1) of regulation 4 referred to as Category C. Schedule 1. Babati Town 2. Mpwapwa Town Water Board 3. Makete Town Water Board 4. Ngara Town Water Board 5. Kibondo Town Water Board 6. Mwanga Town Water Board 7. Same Town Water Board 8. Bunda Town Water Board 9. Tukuyu Town Water Board 10. Mpanda Town Water Board 11. Mbinga Town Water Board 12. Bariadi Town Water Board 13. Kahanta Town Water Board 14. Manyoni Town Water Board 15. Muheza Town Water Board 16. Korogwe Town Water Board 17. Lushoto Town Water Board 18. Sikonge Town Water Board 19. Kyela Town Water Board 20. Geita Town Water Board 21. Sengerema Town Water Board 22. Tarime Town Water Board 23. Ifakara Town Water Board 24. Chunya Town Water Board 25. Makambako Town Water Board 26. Utete Town Water Board 27. Karagwe Town Water Board 28. Masasi Town Water Board 29. Mugumu Town Water Board History of this document 21 June 2002 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 25 Commenced 29 May 2002 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
